chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-709 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 15-01-2024 Muhammad Sharif Magsi, applicant present in person. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, APG for the State a/w Inspector Muhammad Aslam on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. ***** I have heard the applicant in person and perused the impugned order. No case for indulgence is made out and the grievance which the applicant has agitated is basically about his complaint of being harassed by private respondents. The police officer in attendance and the respondent No.3 are directed to provide due protection to the applicant. Since the application for registration of FIR has been dismissed by learned ex-Officio Justice of Peace on cogent reasons, the applicant may approach the proper forum by filing a Criminal Direct Complaint, if he is so advised. The Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
